finding_deltas.compatibility_note: Finding is absent from the compatible baseline and remains imported read-only evidence.
finding_deltas.export_safe_summary: New imported finding remains read-only until current local confirmation exists.

finding_deltas.compatibility_note: Baseline finding is absent from the imported result set and is represented as resolved debt.
finding_deltas.export_safe_summary: Resolved baseline entry is explicit in the delta packet instead of disappearing.

finding_deltas.compatibility_note: Finding matches a compatible baseline entry and remains visible as persisting debt.
finding_deltas.export_safe_summary: Persisting imported finding cites both baseline and local-confirmation refs.

finding_deltas.compatibility_note: Finding is present but governed by a versioned suppression record.
finding_deltas.export_safe_summary: Suppressed imported finding remains visible as governed debt.

finding_deltas.compatibility_note: Finding is present but governed by a versioned waiver record.
finding_deltas.export_safe_summary: Waived imported finding remains visible as release-visible debt.

finding_deltas.compatibility_note: Finding lacks an admitted anchor, so comparison cannot claim new or persisting state.
finding_deltas.export_safe_summary: Unmapped imported finding stays visible but cannot be flattened into live local truth.

export_safe_summary: Diagnostic delta packet covers new, resolved, persisting, suppressed, waived, and unmapped scanner-import states.
